subject: NEWS
body:
Hi. Now All I know  about u is what the general public reads  so I don't 
trust it.   ARE  YOU SET ALLRIGHT ?
You are somehow still important enough to me to really care.  I go  with my 
feelings and gut.  Guess what ?  THough I've appreciated all  the nice and 
generous things you've done for sure, I know you OWN and  have  a good heart  in 
addition to all else ; not only what the newspapers say  about your  financial 
worth  or lifestyle.
(ooooo- speaking "HEART"  Dr Bridwell want to check  something that showed up 
on my CARDIO Clearance taht he thought anesthesiologist  would question . It 
all scares me for the surgery (BIG) but should  Feel safe at BARNES in St 
Louis.  Did u look any up for me ?   Now we have to book flights to make date 
official.  Only fear flying on the  return .
(well, not exatly "only")
Your Pal, 
 
Marcia  M.



**************Planning your summer road trip? Check out AOL Travel Guides.    
  (http://travel.aol.com/travel-guide/united-states?ncid=aoltrv00030000000016)
body_html:
Hi. Now All I know  about u is what the general public reads so I don't trust it.   ARE  YOU SET ALLRIGHT ?
You are somehow still important enough to me to really care.  I go with my feelings and gut.  Guess what ?  THough I've appreciated all the nice and generous things you've done for sure, I know you OWN and  have a good heart  in addition to all else ; not only what the newspapers say about your  financial worth  or lifestyle.
(ooooo- speaking "HEART"  Dr Bridwell want to check something that showed up on my CARDIO Clearance taht he thought anesthesiologist would question . It all scares me for the surgery (BIG) but should  Feel safe at BARNES in St Louis.  Did u look any up for me ?  Now we have to book flights to make date official.  Only fear flying on the return .
(well, not exatly "only")
Your Pal,
 
Marcia M.

subject: NEWS
body:
3 things......   Did you ever receive your birthday card  ?  I thought it was 
too perfect! Would have loved to buy you a present bcs,  It would have made 
ME happy -couldn't think of a thing.
2 ..I read & see you have so much extra on your  plate. You are swamped.  
Wish I could help!?
1...Me ?  heading for surgery - still planning and want  reassurance but my 
head is about there.
Hi to all / a HUG to you.  To me, you  are forever  your inner good guy, kind 
heart, & i like it  .
me ,
Marcia M.

Hi to all / a HUG to you.  To me, you are forever  your inner good guy, kind heart, & i like it .
me ,
